title: Unused npm dependency `motion` in apps/rad-os
summary: `motion@^12.38.0` is declared in the rad-os dependencies but no source file imports anything from `motion` or `motion/*`. All repo-wide `rg` matches for `motion` in code refer to the CSS/design-system `motion` token namespace, not the npm package.
proposed_action: Remove the `motion` entry from `apps/rad-os/package.json` dependencies and run `pnpm install` to refresh the lockfile.

title: Unused npm dependency `motion` in @rdna/radiants
summary: `motion@^12.38.0` is declared under `dependencies` in the radiants package but no `.ts`/`.tsx` file anywhere in the monorepo imports from `motion`. `@rdna/radiants` publishes publicly so an unused runtime dep bloats every downstream install.
proposed_action: Remove the `motion` entry from `packages/radiants/package.json` dependencies and regenerate the lockfile.

title: Unused npm dependency `ts-node` in apps/rad-os
summary: `ts-node@^10.9.2` is declared in rad-os devDependencies. Nothing in the repo (`scripts/`, configs, `.json`, `.mjs`, `.mts`, `.ts`, `.tsx`) references `ts-node` outside the one `package.json` line. TypeScript scripts in this repo use `node --experimental-strip-types` (see `packages/radiants/package.json`).

title: Superseded generator script `generate-icons.mjs`
summary: `generate-icons.mjs` was superseded by the TypeScript rewrite `generate-icons.ts`, which is the script invoked by `generate:icons` (`package.json:111`) and imported by the freshness test at `packages/radiants/test/generate-icons.test.ts`. The `.mjs` copy has no active consumer and is explicitly parked in `knip.json` `ignoreFiles`. Agent 1 also flagged it as a likely dead-code shim during dedup audit.
proposed_action: Delete `packages/radiants/scripts/generate-icons.mjs` and drop the matching entry from `knip.json` `workspaces.packages/radiants.ignoreFiles`.

title: Dead layout primitive `WindowTabs` (no importers)
summary: `WindowTabs` was shipped as a compound layout primitive but no current source file imports it — all hits outside the file and the barrel live in `archive/plans/`, `docs/plans/`, and Playwright snapshots. Tests do not reference it either.
proposed_action: Delete `apps/rad-os/components/Rad_os/WindowTabs.tsx` and remove the `export { WindowTabs } from './WindowTabs';` line in `components/Rad_os/index.ts`.

title: Dead layout primitive `WindowSidebar` (no importers)
summary: `WindowSidebar` is re-exported from `components/Rad_os/index.ts` but nothing imports it. All non-self hits are in `archive/plans/`, `archive/brainstorms/`, and `docs/CODEMAP.md`. The component was never wired up in production.
proposed_action: Delete `apps/rad-os/components/Rad_os/WindowSidebar.tsx` and remove the `export { WindowSidebar } from './WindowSidebar';` line in `components/Rad_os/index.ts`.

title: Dead component `PatternsTab` (zero importers)
summary: `PatternsTab` is exported from `apps/rad-os/components/ui/PatternsTab.tsx` but no source file imports it. The sibling barrel `components/ui/index.ts` contains only a comment (no re-exports). All non-self matches live in `archive/reports/` and `docs/plans/`.
proposed_action: Delete `apps/rad-os/components/ui/PatternsTab.tsx`. Coordinate with DEAD-008 for the now-fully-empty `components/ui/` directory.

title: Unused public helper `getPatternsByDensity` in @rdna/radiants/patterns
summary: `export const getPatternsByDensity` has no importer anywhere in the monorepo. Sibling helpers (`getPatternByName`, `getPatternsByGroup`, `PATTERN_GROUPS`) are actively used. Because `@rdna/radiants` publishes publicly (`publishConfig.access: public`) and `patterns` is an exposed subpath, external consumers may rely on it; confidence is intentionally under 0.80 for that reason.
proposed_action: Report-only for now. If a public-API survey confirms no external consumer, remove the helper in a coordinator-approved minor release wave. Otherwise keep with an explicit `/** @public */` or deprecate first.
